_comment: autodev-lite model roles. Tracked, non-secret — api_key_env holds only env-var NAMES. roles.weak keeps the predecessor schema so resolve_model.py/hybrid_gen.py/hybrid-dev.js run byte-identical; lib/gen MUST stay the sibling of this file (hybrid-dev.js derives one from the other). models.local.json (gitignored) deep-merges on top for the WEAK role only.

strong._comment: passed to `claude -p --model`; alias or full id; per-run override: autodev run --strong sonnet. B3: operator set strong=Fable for ALL strong-model work — planning, orchestration/PM, Lane-A review, finding-evaluator/audit, and hybrid-dev's strong side (it reads roles.strong).

codex._comment: operator-pinned (D34); --ignore-user-config skips ~/.codex/config.toml so all three are passed as -c flags; a null value omits its flag. timeout_sec MUST stay <600 (D46): the review runs codex in a FOREGROUND Bash call whose tool-level cap is 600000ms, so 570 lets codex self-skip cleanly instead of being killed by the tool.
